items.name: multi-state-button
items.title: MultiStateButton
items.description: Generic multi-state animated button with slot-machine label transitions. Domain-agnostic; bring your own state union.

items.name: transaction-button
items.title: TransactionButton
items.description: Transaction-submission preset over MultiStateButton. Seven-state lifecycle (idle / ready / signing / broadcasting / bestBlock / finalized / failed) with sensible defaults and auto-preventDefault on terminal-state clicks.

items.name: clamp
items.title: clamp
items.description: Clamp a number into an inclusive [min, max] range.

items.name: use-scroll-end
items.title: useScrollEnd
items.description: Fire a callback when scrolling settles on an element — native scrollend where supported, trailing debounce fallback elsewhere (Safari).

items.name: use-click-outside
items.title: useClickOutside
items.description: Invoke a handler on pointer/focus events outside an element — or outside every element in an array of refs. Latest-callback ref so inline handlers don't resubscribe; toggle with an enabled flag.

items.name: scroll-strip
items.title: ScrollStrip
items.description: Filmstrip of clipped slivers, horizontal or vertical; the active frame expands via a clip-path reveal while neighbors part to make room. Headless frames (nodes or render functions receiving { active }), native container-scoped scroll, snap-and-expand on settle, keyboard nav.

items.name: time-machine
items.title: TimeMachine
items.description: A stack of frames you cycle and scroll through, with a 3D-recede animation. Headless: owns only the stack mechanics — you fully style each frame (any React node). Scroll, keyboard, or controlled.

items.name: use-haptic
items.title: useHaptic
items.description: A light haptic tick on mobile, silent no-op on desktop. navigator.vibrate on Android/Chromium; on iOS Safari 17.4+ clicks a hidden switch checkbox to fire the native toggle haptic (the web-haptics technique). Rate-limited, lazily mounted, SSR-safe.

items.name: tick-tape
items.title: TickTape
items.description: A tape-measure value scrubber: a strip of ticks dragged, wheeled, tapped, or arrow-keyed under a fixed center indicator, snapping to the nearest tick with a velocity-scaled proximity glow trailing the motion. Haptic tick per step on mobile. Headless mechanics — tick/glow/label/indicator appearance via className slots and render props. Controlled or uncontrolled.

items.name: timer-surface
items.title: TimerSurface
items.description: Sleep-timer preset over MorphSurface + TickTape. A duration pill morphs into a dark iOS-style panel: a minute tape scrubbed under a fixed pointer, live duration readout, and a start button. Bakes in the timer domain — minute range, h:mm:ss formatting, orange-on-black palette, start/collapse semantics.

items.name: morph-surface
items.title: MorphSurface
items.description: A surface that springs between a small trigger and a larger panel, morphing width, height, and corner radius in one motion. Headless: owns the morph, open/close, and dismissal (click-outside + Escape) — collapsed/expanded are your content. Share a layoutId across both to travel an element between states. Controlled or uncontrolled.
